title: poa secunda var. juncifolia
intro: Poa secunda var. juncifolia, also known as the Needle-and-thread Grass or Bluebunch Wheatgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa secunda var. juncifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be consumed as a fresh juice or added to smoothies.
